title: Hecatactis bellidiformis
taxonomy: Hecatactis bellidiformis is a species of bryophyte. It belongs to the family Hecatactidaceae. The species is classified as a genus within the order Hecatactidales, and more broadly, as a division of non-vascular land plants. The classification of Hecatactis bellidiformis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Bryophyta, Class: Bryopsida, Order: Hecatactidales, Family: Hecatactidaceae, and Genus: Hecatactis. This complex classification highlights the plant's unique characteristics and its place within the plant kingdom.
